data.location: 270 Captain Thomas Boulevard, West Haven, CT
data.short_description: A new ice cream shop called Coastal Cone Creamery is preparing to open in West Haven at the former Savin Rock Surf Shop location. The business will occupy approximately 1,187 square feet and plans to serve ice cream along with other frozen treats. Renovations are actively underway as of late March 2026.

Club Studio, a luxury gym chain owned by Fitness International, is eyeing the former LA Fitness location in Norwalk after that gym closes on April 7, 2026. The concept features boutique fitness studios offering yoga, boxing, pilates, and cryotherapy alongside a traditional open gym. The chain currently operates 18 locations nationwide with 23 more in development.

A new luxury boutique hotel has opened in downtown Mystic, steps from local shops, restaurants, and attractions. The property features upscale suites with waterfront views in select rooms and a tranquil atmosphere despite its proximity to the bustling downtown district. Accommodations can be booked through mysticriverinn.com.

data.location: 195 Charlton Road (Noble Gas Station), Sturbridge, MA
data.short_description: An ice cream shop called Frisbie's Dairy Barn has opened at the Noble travel center in Sturbridge, Massachusetts, offering nearly two dozen flavors plus sundaes, cones, and flights. Additionally, The Bol Place, a health-focused fast-casual eatery specializing in grain and protein bowls, is arriving soon to the same location.

Ragozzino's Deli & Catering has transitioned to new ownership under Robert Bongiolatti and Maggie Garcia, reopening in late February 2026 with the traditional menu maintained alongside fresh offerings. The Italian deli provides sandwiches, pizza, breakfast items, catering services, imported specialty goods, soups, and salads. Hours are Tuesday-Friday 9am-4pm and Saturday 9am-3pm.

A new vintage cooperative shop is debuting in Canton's historic Collinsville factory district at the Collins Company Axe Factory. The venue features multiple local vendors selling vintage furniture, decor, clothing, and miscellaneous items. The grand opening on April 18 includes live vinyl DJing, beverages from a local brewery, and complimentary cookies.

Crystal Mall is closing its doors on March 31, 2026, with owner General Dynamics Electric Boat announcing the end of majority operations. The property will be repurposed as an EB facility featuring offices, a training center, and support services, with renovations beginning in the former Macy's space. A hiring event is scheduled for April 11, 2026.

LuAnn's Bakery & Cafe will open its Hartford location on March 31, 2026 at 7am in the former Citizens Bank building, offering coffees, freshly baked pastries, breakfast, and lunch items. The first 100 customers receive a commemorative opening-day pin. This marks the fourth location for the bakery, joining existing operations in Ellington and Stafford.

data.location: 1445 New Britain Avenue, Corbin's Corner, West Hartford, CT
data.short_description: Angel Land, a kids' entertainment center, is preparing to open its second U.S. location at Corbin's Corner in West Hartford. The facility will feature climbing structures, obstacle courses, ball pits, slides, foam areas, and imagination play areas designed for children 10 and under, with private party rooms available. The company is currently recruiting staff.

Shah's Halal Food has opened its second Waterbury location at 1051 Wolcott Street in a space formerly occupied by a 7-Eleven and smoke shop. The restaurant serves gyros, platters, falafel, burgers, wings, salads, hummus, and more, operating daily from 11am to 11pm with online ordering coming soon. This expands the chain's growing presence across Connecticut.
